data.title: Smarsh Accelerates Public Sector Expansion with FedRAMP Authorization Commitment
data.description: Smarsh, based in Portland, Oregon, has made significant progress in expanding its presence in the public sector by committing to obtain FedRAMP authorization. This move is crucial for the company as it aims to enhance its services and cater to government agencies. FedRAMP authorization is a vital step that will allow Smarsh to provide secure and compliant solutions to federal organizations. This commitment underscores Smarsh's dedication to meeting the stringent regulatory requirements of the public sector.

data.title: Fairbanks Morse Defense’s Bird-Johnson Propeller Receives Propeller Order for 100th DDG-51 Destroyer
data.description: In Beloit, Wisconsin, Bird-Johnson Propellers, a subsidiary of Fairbanks Morse Defense (FMD), has secured an order to provide propellers for the 100th DDG-51 Arleigh Burke-Class destroyer of the U.S. Navy. This milestone highlights the trusted performance of Bird-Johnson's propulsion systems and the continued prominence of the U.S. Navy’s adaptable surface combatant fleet. This order underscores the lasting partnership between Bird-Johnson and the U.S. Navy in delivering essential equipment for naval operations. The DDG-51 class destroyers are known for their versatility and effectiveness in various missions, showcasing the ongoing commitment to maritime security and defense.

data.title: AEye to Report 2026 First Quarter Results on Wednesday, May 13 and Host Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: AEye, Inc., a prominent player in software-driven high-performance lidar technology, disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for Q1 of 2026 post-market closure on Wednesday, May 13, 2026. This announcement will be complemented by a conference call and webcast scheduled for the same day, commencing at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time). The discussion will feature AEye's CEO, Matt Fisch, and CFO, Conor Tierney, who will delve into the financial report and offer insights into the company's operations. AEye trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LIDR.

data.title: Starfighters Space Joins C-STARS Consortium to Advance Space Manufacturing and Research at Kennedy Space Center
data.description: Starfighters Space, Inc., a commercial aerospace company owning the fastest fleet of supersonic aircraft globally, has disclosed its membership in the Center for Science, Technology, and Advanced Research in Space (C-STARS). This center is a potential National Science Foundation (NSF) Industry–University Cooperative Research Center (IUCRC) concentrated on propelling space manufacturing and preparing upcoming talent for the sector. Starfighters is listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol FJET.

data.title: Mobix Labs Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Rule
data.description: In Irvine, California, Mobix Labs, Inc. (NASDAQ: MOBX) has revealed receiving written confirmation from the Nasdaq Listing Qualifications Department. The notice stated that the company has successfully met the minimum bid price requirement as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) to maintain its listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market. This compliance comes after the closing bid price reached the required threshold. Mobix Labs specializes in cutting-edge technology solutions for defense, aerospace, and high-reliability sectors.

data.title: CleanCapital Sells 120 MW Solar Project to Energix Renewables
data.description: CleanCapital has recently finalized the sale of a significant solar development project in Ohio with a capacity of 120 MW to Energix Renewables. This transaction marks a major milestone for CleanCapital in expanding its renewable energy portfolio.

data.title: Graham Corporation to Present at the Oppenheimer 21st Annual Industrial Growth Conference
data.description: Batavia, New York – Graham Corporation (NYSE: GHM), a renowned company specializing in critical fluid, power, heat transfer, vacuum, and advanced mixing technologies for the Defense, Energy & Process, and Space sectors, disclosed that its President and CEO, Matthew J. Malone, and Vice President of Finance and CFO, Christopher J. Thome, will participate in Oppenheimer’s 21st Annual Industrial Growth Virtual Conference. This event serves as a platform for showcasing the company's expertise in these industries, emphasizing its global leadership position.

data.title: Hadron Energy Submits Principal Design Criteria Whitepaper to U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission, Marking Pivotal Licensing Milestone for Halo Microreactor
data.description: Hadron Energy, Inc., a company specializing in advanced nuclear microreactor technology, recently shared that it has submitted its Principal Design Criteria (PDC) White Paper for their Halo Modular Microreactor (Halo MMR) to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC). This submission, made as part of the pre-application process under 10 CFR Part 52 with Project No. 99902144, was officially dated April 10, 2026. The PDC White Paper sets out the technical and safety standards that will be applied to all aspects of the project.

data.title: IP strategy advances accessibility to programmable IP infrastructure, shaping the global wallet narrative.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, marking a slight decrease from the previous month. The economy added a total of 250,000 jobs, exceeding expectations and showcasing strong growth in various sectors. Additionally, the average hourly earnings increased by 3.2% compared to the previous year, indicating an improvement in wage growth. These positive trends are seen as a boost to the overall economic outlook and a sign of continued recovery from the pandemic-induced recession. The labor market continues to show resilience and adaptability in the face of challenges, providing hope for a robust and sustained recovery in the near future.

data.title: Enphase Energy Expands VPP Capabilities in Australia with Evergen
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Fremont, California, Enphase Energy, Inc., a prominent global energy technology company known for microinverter-based solar and battery systems, revealed a new collaboration. The company shared the news of integrating Enphase ® IQ ® Batteries with Evergen, a cutting-edge distributed energy and virtual power plant (VPP) orchestration platform in Australia. Evergen is utilized by major energy retailers in Australia and New Zealand. Enphase, with over 65 VPP programs in eight countries, holds significant expertise in empowering homeowners to engage in grid services. This partnership signifies a major development in the renewable energy sector.

data.title: Las Vegas Metropolitan Police Signs Five-Year WrapReality™ Contract Renewal with WRAP® to Advance Immersive Training and Non-Lethal Response™ Preparedness
data.description: A loyal customer has decided to renew their agreement with WrapReality, showcasing their ongoing commitment to using immersive training for skill enhancement and smooth onboarding processes. This renewal underscores the importance of utilizing such technology for continual development within the company's workforce.

data.title: LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO) Eliminates $15M+ Short-Term Liabilities, Delivering $13M+ in Cash Savings; Expands Stock Conversion Program to $15M+ at $7.50 per Share, with $8M Completed
data.description: On April 22, 2026, LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO), a prominent music, entertainment, and technology platform based in Los Angeles, unveiled a set of key financial and operational achievements. These milestones are designed to bolster its financial position and support its future growth strategies.

data.title: Roots Continues Partnership with the Nature Conservancy of Canada and Launches Special T-Shirt Series for Earth Month
data.description: In Toronto, the outdoor lifestyle brand Roots Corporation (TSX: ROOT) marks its third year of collaboration with the Nature Conservancy of Canada (NCC) with a limited-edition t-shirt series. This initiative aims to aid conservation efforts in a vital Canadian region. Partnering with Accelerating Circularity, Roots showcases the recycling of used textiles into new materials through these t-shirts. The collection includes three unique designs, illustrating the brand's commitment to sustainability and support for environmental preservation.

data.title: Palmetto Citizens FCU Deepens Collaboration With NCR Atleos to Expand Self-Service Banking Access
data.description: NCR Atleos Corporation revealed that $1.4 billion-asset Palmetto Citizens Federal Credit Union has broadened its partnership with Atleos, integrating Interactive Teller Machines (ITMs) and ATM as a Service (ATMaaS) solutions. This move aims to enhance convenience, efficiency, and accessibility for members. Palmetto Citizens FCU, a leading financial institution, will benefit from these expanded self-service options offered by Atleos.
